description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' and 'Premium Pomegranate Nectar' on the front, featuring a large, realistic image of a pomegranate fruit. The carton is primarily white with gold accents, including a gold-colored top and side panels. The packaging includes a white plastic screw cap located at the top corner for pouring. One side of the carton displays detailed nutritional information and product details in multiple languages, while the other side repeats the brand name vertically. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a glossy finish that suggests a premium product. The carton appears to be made of laminated cardboard with a plastic cap and likely contains liquid juice inside.
description: A white and gold rectangular juice carton with a pomegranate image, labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' and featuring a white screw cap. The packaging is glossy and displays nutritional information on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' label and a large pomegranate image, with the cap visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the vertical 'FARAGELLO' branding and the gold-colored top, with the cap angled to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring detailed nutritional information and product details in multiple languages, with the gold top and cap visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the vertical 'FARAGELLO' branding and part of the nutritional panel, with the cap angled to the right.
